title: Nulltal
description: This mod adds 2 new items so you can block the end portal frames and break nether portals
body:
[![RubyHost Partnership](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/734de55b9d68de8d0d141c95b975144be608660a_0.webp)](https://billing.rubyhost.net/aff.php?aff=22)

# In this mod you can end your friendships by blocking all portals in the server.

**This is a simple mod that adds 2 items, one for blocking end portals and the other to break nether portals.**

**I've made this on a afternoon because i was bored, the mod it's nothing special.**
 
# Features:

**Warrok:** Tool used to turn obsidian into crying obsidian, great for quickly breaking nether portals without needing water or a pickaxe

**Ender Blocker:** Identical to an eye of ender, it can be used on end portal frames to block them thus rendering them unusable

# No end for a weak!

### I have no plans to carry the mod to any past version of Minecraft or Fabric, if you find a bug please report so i can solve it right away.

### **__Do not install this mod from any other site, it's fake and may contain viruses or unwanted software, i only post mods on Curseforge or Modrinth and always go by the name Ruby.__**

# You can use this mod in your modpack freely.
